chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1513 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 01.09.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chandio, Advocate for Petitioner No.1. Respondent No.10, father of Petitioner No.1, present in person. M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG along with Inspector Khalil-ur-Rehman SHO Khybrani, ASI Ghulam Rasool Jamali on behalf of SHO PS Sakrand, ASI Muhammad Bilawal, LPC Fozia Magsi and HC Muhammad Ali Jarwar. ----- Petitioner No.1 Mst. Rizwana has been produced from Darul Aman by ASI Muhammad Bilawal and LPC Fozia Magsi. She has reiterated the same statement made on last date of hearing. She has stated that she has married the Petitioner No.2 of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure and wants to go with him (Petitioner No.2). In view of the statement of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Rizwana, she is returned back to Darual Aman Hyderabad with the direction that she shall be released today to go with her husband, the Petitioner No.2. Petitioners also seek protection against alleged harassment by the respondents. Learned AAG and APG along with police officials present in court undertake to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required in accordance with law. In respect of controversy regarding age of petitioner No.1, respondent No.10 would be at liberty to avail remedy under the Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act or any other law, as the case may be. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
